requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerating Appliances (SONCAP + NIS IEC 60335-2-24)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具（SONCAP + NIS IEC 60335-2-24）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具（SONCAP + NIS IEC 60335-2-24）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances (refrigerators, freezers, refrigerator-freezer combinations) imported into Nigeria must demonstrate electrical safety conformity to the Nigerian Industrial Standard adopting IEC 60335-2-24 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), read together with the general standard NIS IEC 60335-1. The Standards Organisation of Nigeria (SON) adopts IEC standards as NIS and enforces compliance through the mandatory SON Conformity Assessment Programme (SONCAP). Test reports must demonstrate the product is rated and safe at the Nigerian nominal supply of 230 V 50 Hz. Key requirements mirror IEC 60335-2-24: protection against electric shock; insulation resistance and dielectric strength; earthing continuity; creepage and clearance distances; thermal cut-outs; mechanical strength; and appliance markings. Conformity is evidenced by an accredited-laboratory test report and a SON Product Certificate, which underpins the per-shipment SONCAP Certificate required before customs clearance.
summary.zh: 进口至尼日利亚的家用制冷器具（电冰箱、冷冻箱、冰箱-冷冻箱组合）须按采纳IEC 60335-2-24的尼日利亚工业标准（家用和类似用途电器的安全——第2-24部分：制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求）证明电气安全符合性，并须与通用标准NIS IEC 60335-1结合使用。尼日利亚标准组织（SON）将IEC标准采纳为NIS，并通过强制性的SON符合性评定计划（SONCAP）监督执行。检测报告须证明产品在尼日利亚标称供电230伏50赫兹下额定且安全。核心要求与IEC 60335-2-24一致：防触电保护；绝缘电阻与介电强度；接地连续性；爬电距离与电气间隙；热断路器；机械强度；及器具标识。符合性以认可实验室检测报告及SON产品证书为证，该证书支撑清关前每批货所需的SONCAP证书。
summary.zht: 進口至奈及利亞的家用製冷器具（電冰箱、冷凍箱、冰箱-冷凍箱組合）須按採納IEC 60335-2-24的奈及利亞工業標準（家用和類似用途電器的安全——第2-24部分：製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求）證明電氣安全符合性，並須與通用標準NIS IEC 60335-1結合使用。奈及利亞標準組織（SON）將IEC標準採納為NIS，並通過強制性的SON符合性評定計畫（SONCAP）監督執行。檢測報告須證明產品在奈及利亞標稱供電230伏50赫茲下額定且安全。核心要求與IEC 60335-2-24一致：防觸電保護；絕緣電阻與介電強度；接地連續性；爬電距離與電氣間隙；熱斷路器；機械強度；及器具標識。符合性以認可實驗室檢測報告及SON產品證書為證，該證書支撐清關前每批貨所需的SONCAP證書。

standards_or_laws: NIS IEC 60335-2-24 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (adopted by SON as Nigerian Industrial Standard)
NIS IEC 60335-1 — General requirements (read in conjunction with Part 2-24)
SON Conformity Assessment Programme (SONCAP) — mandatory pre-import conformity scheme administered by the Standards Organisation of Nigeria

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 4706.13-2014 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), technically derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with Chinese national deviations and read with GB 4706.1 (general requirements). GB 4706.13 is mandatory and enforced by SAMR under the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) regime; products must be CCC-certified by a CNCA-designated body before sale in China. Because Nigeria's NIS adopts the same IEC 60335-2-24 base text, the underlying technical content is closely aligned. However, CCC certificates and GB 4706.13 test reports are issued for the Chinese market at 220 V 50 Hz and are NOT accepted by SON in place of SONCAP; a separate conformity assessment leading to a SON Product Certificate is required.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的强制性安全标准为GB 4706.13-2014（家用和类似用途电器的安全——制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），技术上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010并含中国国家偏差，须与GB 4706.1（通用要求）结合使用。GB 4706.13为强制性标准，由市场监管总局（SAMR）通过中国强制认证（CCC）制度监督执行；产品须经CNCA指定机构完成CCC认证方可在中国销售。由于尼日利亚NIS采纳相同的IEC 60335-2-24基础文本，底层技术内容高度一致。但CCC证书及GB 4706.13检测报告系针对中国市场220伏50赫兹出具，不被SON接受以替代SONCAP；须另行进行符合性评定并取得SON产品证书。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的強制性安全標準為GB 4706.13-2014（家用和類似用途電器的安全——製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），技術上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010並含中國國家偏差，須與GB 4706.1（通用要求）結合使用。GB 4706.13為強制性標準，由市場監管總局（SAMR）通過中國強制認證（CCC）制度監督執行；產品須經CNCA指定機構完成CCC認證方可在中國銷售。由於奈及利亞NIS採納相同的IEC 60335-2-24基礎文本，底層技術內容高度一致。但CCC證書及GB 4706.13檢測報告系針對中國市場220伏50赫茲出具，不被SON接受以替代SONCAP；須另行進行符合性評定並取得SON產品證書。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (mandatory; derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with national deviations; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB 4706.1-2005 — General requirements (read in conjunction with GB 4706.13)

gap.en: Although Nigeria's NIS IEC 60335-2-24 and China's GB 4706.13 share the same IEC base text, Chinese CCC certification does not satisfy Nigerian market access. Exporters must: (1) enrol the product in SONCAP and obtain a SON Product Certificate, supported by a test report from a SON-accepted/accredited laboratory covering IEC 60335-2-24 (and IEC 60335-1); (2) ensure ratings, marking, and test conditions reflect the Nigerian 230 V 50 Hz nominal supply rather than China's 220 V — a re-statement or supplementary test of voltage-dependent ratings may be required; (3) confirm that plug/socket and earthing configurations suit the Nigerian installed base (Nigeria predominantly uses BS 1363 / Type G outlets); (4) obtain, for each consignment, a SONCAP Certificate before goods can be cleared at Lagos (Apapa/Tin Can) or Onne. CB Scheme (IEC 60335-2-24) reports may reduce re-testing scope at the laboratory stage — manufacturers should verify acceptance with their SONCAP licensed certification body.
gap.zh: 尽管尼日利亚NIS IEC 60335-2-24与中国GB 4706.13共享相同的IEC基础文本，中国CCC认证仍不满足尼日利亚市场准入。出口商须：（1）将产品纳入SONCAP并取得SON产品证书，并以SON认可/认证实验室出具的涵盖IEC 60335-2-24（及IEC 60335-1）的检测报告为支撑；（2）确保额定值、标识及试验条件反映尼日利亚230伏50赫兹标称供电而非中国220伏——可能须对依赖电压的额定值重新声明或补充测试；（3）确认插头/插座及接地配置适配尼日利亚本地（尼日利亚主要使用BS 1363 / G型插座）；（4）每批货物在拉各斯（阿帕帕/廷坎）或奥内清关前须取得SONCAP证书。CB体系（IEC 60335-2-24）报告或可在实验室阶段缩减重新测试范围——制造商应向其SONCAP持牌认证机构核实接受情况。
gap.zht: 儘管奈及利亞NIS IEC 60335-2-24與中國GB 4706.13共享相同的IEC基礎文本，中國CCC認證仍不滿足奈及利亞市場准入。出口商須：（1）將產品納入SONCAP並取得SON產品證書，並以SON認可/認證實驗室出具的涵蓋IEC 60335-2-24（及IEC 60335-1）的檢測報告為支撐；（2）確保額定值、標識及試驗條件反映奈及利亞230伏50赫茲標稱供電而非中國220伏——可能須對依賴電壓的額定值重新聲明或補充測試；（3）確認插頭/插座及接地配置適配奈及利亞本地（奈及利亞主要使用BS 1363 / G型插座）；（4）每批貨物在拉各斯（阿帕帕/廷坎）或奧內清關前須取得SONCAP證書。CB體系（IEC 60335-2-24）報告或可在實驗室階段縮減重新測試範圍——製造商應向其SONCAP持牌認證機構核實接受情況。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SONCAP Product Certificate and per-shipment SONCAP Certificate required before import clearance; conformity demonstrated to NIS IEC 60335-2-24 (and IEC 60335-1); administered by SON
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required under GB 4706.13-2014 before sale in China; administered by SAMR/CNCA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SONCAP certification to NIS IEC 60335-2-24 is mandatory for household refrigerating appliances entering Nigeria. Although Nigeria and China share the IEC 60335-2-24 base text, Chinese CCC/GB 4706.13 certification does not satisfy SONCAP; a SON Product Certificate plus a per-shipment SONCAP Certificate is required, with ratings reflecting 230 V 50 Hz. IECEE CB Scheme reports may reduce laboratory re-testing — verify acceptance with your SONCAP licensed certification body.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入尼日利亚的家用制冷器具须强制取得按NIS IEC 60335-2-24的SONCAP认证。尽管尼日利亚与中国共享IEC 60335-2-24基础文本，中国CCC/GB 4706.13认证不满足SONCAP；须取得SON产品证书及每批货的SONCAP证书，且额定值须反映230伏50赫兹。IECEE CB体系报告或可缩减实验室重新测试——请向您的SONCAP持牌认证机构核实接受情况。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入奈及利亞的家用製冷器具須強制取得按NIS IEC 60335-2-24的SONCAP認證。儘管奈及利亞與中國共享IEC 60335-2-24基礎文本，中國CCC/GB 4706.13認證不滿足SONCAP；須取得SON產品證書及每批貨的SONCAP證書，且額定值須反映230伏50赫茲。IECEE CB體系報告或可縮減實驗室重新測試——請向您的SONCAP持牌認證機構核實接受情況。
